## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.33

### 🎥 Camera WebRTC
- Signals local ICE candidates with the same loopback-only filtering used by the Android app WebRTC path, avoiding an extra TCP-candidate assumption in the camera offer flow.

### 🔎 Debug Logging
- Keeps the camera startup trace focused on PEER_IN, SDP offer, ICE candidates, PEER_OUT, and answer state for the next camera test report.
